title: The Significance of Timothée Chalamet Skipping the Met Gala for the Knicks Game
summary: Timmy Supreme attended a random playoff game over the society event of the year, and the dudes are noticing. Was he dodging the controversy around the gala, or vying for the status of #1 Knicks superfan?

title: EDITION Opens in Lake Como With Star-Studded Weekend Kickoff
summary: The opening of the EDITION brought out an intimate group of actors and artists alike, for a weekend of culinary and cultural festivities
